2604.20304.title: LLM-guided phase diagram construction through high-throughput experimentation
2604.20304.paper_summary: Constructing phase diagrams for multicomponent alloys requires extensive experimental measurements and is a time-consuming task. Here we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can guide experimental planning for phase diagram construction. In our framework, a general-purpose LLM serves as the experimental planner, suggesting compositions for measurement at each cycle in a closed loop with high-throughput synthesis and X-ray diffraction phase identification. Using this framework, we experimentally constructed the ternary phase diagram of the Co-Al-Ge system at 900 degree C through iterative synthesis and characterization. We compared two strategies that differ in how the initial compositions are selected: one uses predictions from a domain-specific LLM trained on phase diagram data (aLLoyM), while the other relies solely on the general-purpose LLM. The two strategies exhibited complementary strengths. aLLoyM directed the initial measurements toward compositionally complex regions in the interior of the ternary diagram, enabling the earliest discovery of all three novel phases that form only in the ternary system. In contrast, the general-purpose LLM adopted a textbook-like approach which efficiently identified a larger number of phases in fewer cycles. In addition, a simulated benchmark comparing the LLM against conventional machine learning confirmed that the LLM achieves more efficient exploration. The results demonstrate that LLMs have high potential as experimental planners for phase diagram construction.
2604.20304.paper_summary_zh: 建構多組分合金的相圖需要大量的實驗測量，並且是一項耗時的任務。這裡我們探討大型語言模型（LLMs）是否能夠指導相圖建構的實驗規劃。在我們的框架中，一個通用的LLM作為實驗規劃者，在高通量合成和X射線衍射相識別的閉環中，為每個循環建議測量的組成。利用這個框架，我們通過迭代合成和表徵，在900攝氏度下實驗性地構建了Co-Al-Ge系統的三元相圖。我們比較了兩種在初始組成選擇上有所不同的策略：一種使用基於相圖數據訓練的領域特定LLM（aLLoyM）進行預測，而另一種則僅依賴通用LLM。這兩種策略展現了互補的優勢。aLLoyM將初始測量指向三元相圖內部的組成複雜區域，使得能夠最早發現僅在三元系統中形成的三種新相。相對而言，通用LLM採取了類似教科書的方法，能夠在更少的循環中有效識別更多的相。此外，模擬基準比較了LLM與傳統機器學習，證實LLM實現了更高效的探索。結果顯示，LLMs作為相圖建構的實驗規劃者具有很高的潛力。
2604.20304.author: Ryo Tamura et.al.
2604.20304.authors: Ryo Tamura, Haruhiko Morito, Yuna Oikawa, Guillaume Deffrennes, Shoichi Matsuda, Naruki Yoshikawa, Tomoaki Takayama, Taichi Abe, Koji Tsuda, Kei Terayama
